samples:
I'm dying
No, I can't get over this anymore
Indisposed
This vision is getting clearer now
Get ready for what comes next
The end of my illusions


It crushes me
Underneath the weight of all these lies
Destroying every structure I built before
You're killing me, no one cares
A load so heavy, impossible to handle
Don't even try to understand
Indisposed


Get ready
This vision is getting clear now
I'm falling awake in the dark
Enter me lion
Leave this hell alone
Until dawn
Against the flow of time
Awakened beast awaken!
New light awake within me !
Leave this hell alone until dawn !

Get ready
This vision is getting clear now
I'm falling awake in the dark
Enter me lion
Leave this hell alone until dawn
New light awake within me ! New light awake within me !
New light awake within me ! New light awake within me !

You dig a hole in the ground
I don't think I can get out of sight


Dig a hole right under my feet, drop me down to hell
Wake up crushed under load
Don't understand all this pressure grind me down so hard
Cannot see stars in the sky anymore


Get ready now, come on down
Leave no time for crying
Throw your arms wide open, let go
The weight is too heavy ! 

Carved by the mountains
Surrender !


Dig a hole right under my feet, drop me down to hell
Wake up crushed under load
Don't understand all this pressure grind me down so hard
Cannot see stars in the sky anymore !  
( cannot see stars in the sky anymore )

Get ready now, come on down
Leave no time for crying !   Throw your arms wide open
Leave no time for crying !  Throw your arms wide open

Enter
Get ready now …    Leave no time for crying

Lost in space, cannot get away
No one cares to hear my prayer
Open door I must cross the line
Feel so alone out there
Fight against time, understand space
Reach beyond the stars and space
Get ready for a long fight awake
Get ready for what's coming your way


When you come home, home is just
Don't bow your knees, bow your head low down
Against the wall I lean
Against the wall I put myself
Righteous anger burning bright
Don't care what they say against me now
I don't get tired of fighting
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah...


You are on fire from within
Fill yourself with force straight from the core
And raise up, you shall overcome this load
Raise up, understand space
The living stars become more than a vision
Get ready for life, go straight through us all
Enter our soul reborn awaken and reborn


Don't bow your knees, bow your head low down
Don't bow your knees, bow your head low down
Don't bow your knees, bow your head low down

The great river flows and flows
We are running out of time
Out in space we float
Earth is round, the stars around us shine
And this old star will burn for good


Fire! Fire ! Burning ! Burning !  Burning !


Our planet Earth, our home 
Rising from the mud to the sky 
Reaching beyond the stars
New dimensions opening up
This force rising inside …
Don't bow to anyone !   Leave me alone !  Rise ! 



Fire! Fire ! Burning ! Burning ! Burning !  Burning !


Hypnotized by the flame     Leave me alone !  Rise !




Opened tunnel portal
Enter my world,  Enter now
I enter ...





Hypnotized by the flame     Leave me alone !  Rise !            




           … Leave me alone !  Rise !    Leave me alone !  Rise !


Lost in the flames
Dream awake,   Vision bright !       Leave me alone !  Rise !

There's a river flowing, and it'll flow forever
And the reason why you dig until your legs fall off is there
The pressure builds inside of me to get out, don't bow anymore
No respect for laws
All over this mud I lay down
No reason no sense, they try to break us down
Lost in this circle
I grow until I can't even hold on anymore


Don't lock yourself in
Break the silence
Overcrowded space
Is killing us all

Leave this load behind
Don't want to carry that burden anymore
Throw this load away
Enter this maze straight into our mind

Wake up! Wake up!

Lost in this circle
I grow until I can't even hold on anymore
Lost in this circle
Lost in this circle

Lost in this circle
Lost in this circle
Lost in this circle
Lost in this circle


Leave this load behind ! Enter !

Leave this load behind

They put me in the frame
Leave the structure alone
Don't want to break down, I grow
My roots dig deep inside


So long time ago you told me "Yes"
To try your best and overcome obstacles
Now all these years after it came true
And I felt a force flowing through my veins
I changed along the way so many times
And now respect this power of reason
But can't get enough - dive deeper still
Dive deeper still ! 


Break the circle
Surrender the beast within !


Get ready for takeoff (get ready) Get set, aim straight ahead … Fly high !

Fly above !  ...Fly higher ... fly forever !!

Release the pressure ! Release the tension !!!   Fly higher … Fly higher  !!

This thing is getting bigger !!!      Fly higher … Fly higher …  Higher  !!




You better fight for it !    Against all odds !  Against  !!

Don't bow down … against us … ​bow down low !!!   Against  … !!

Carved out of stone
This temple long ago
For those who pray
To this god of war


Their vision awake now
Get ready to fight!
Don't bow down yet!
You're meant for better things!

Enter the lion's mouth
And fly like an eagle
Wake up, fight, destroy and conquer
It's in your hands now !

Ones to be honored, are living legends !
Incredible power flows from their hearts !
Against all odds they fight !
They overcome !

The roots go deep below !
Carved out of rock solid ground ! !
Indestructible beams rise straight ! !

Leave no one alive but you ! !
Carved out of granite ! 


Enter the lion's mouth
And fly like an eagle
Wake up, fight, destroy and conquer
It's in your hands now ! ! ! ! 

 Enter the lion's mouth ! !  


Enter the lion's mouth ! ! !

Lost all reason why you fight
Against the grind of hatred on a scale so wrong
Leave the mud under your feet, don't dig deeper
Turn around and face the truth - better now


Wake up the beast that is inside you
Don't bow to the great old ones awake
It's time to reveal what was hidden from yourself
Break these chains that bind your attention
Leave it behind and get ready for another round

Dig out the core within
The river flows underneath your feet
Go down low enough until you find
Your strength reborn awaken

You grow to understand this world you live in
Don't bow down to no one but yourself alone
Face reality, change direction straight away
Get back to basics and discover what was lost


Leave it behind and get ready for another round!
Leave it behind and get ready for another round!
Leave it behind and get ready for another round!
Leave it behind and get ready for another round!

Enter the storm, enter my mind
You took all my strength away
I fell awake on the floor
And cried out in despair


Lost in illusion of being better than I was before
Indisposed by illusions we create to destroy ourselves
A lion, a lion is running through my veins
Carved in stone, always awaken

Don't bow down until your pride is crushed
Get ready for battle 'cause this thing is coming soon
Awaken from the storm that runs inside of you
Fight till the end, fight till the end
Wake up ! Wake up !! Wake up !!

Leave it alone ! Leave it alone ! Leave it alone ! Leave it alone !

Awake ! Awake ! Awake ! Awake !
Awake ! Awake ! Awake ! Awake !
Awake ! Awake ! Awake ! Awake !
Awake ! Awake ! Awake ! Awake !

Leave it alone ! Leave it alone ! Leave it alone ! Leave it alone !

Leave it alone ! Leave it alone ! Leave it alone ! Leave it alone !

This is not the end of our lives
These stars are shining down on us
Don't bow down, don't kneel down
You will get through this ride
But now you know who rules


Enter your mind, enter your dreams 
And create a master plan
Indisposable force that runs 
Through all creation straight to where we came from


This race against time ends in silence !

When faced with our masters
We  bow   down   in front 
Of  a  lump    of     rock      we  call  God
Respect and respect ourselves too...

This  race   against time ends  in silence ! 
Against time, against space ! 
Against time, against space !

This race against time ends in silence ! 
Against time, against space ! 
Against time, against space !

Enter your mind, enter your dreams ...
Enter your mind, enter your dreams ! 
Enter your mind, enter your dreams !
